title: Cornell Trading Competition
summary: QUARCC placed third at the Cornell Trading Competition, outperforming many ivy league school's teams.
detail: The competition was open to 𝐮𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐝𝐮𝐚𝐭𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐦𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐬𝐭𝐮𝐝𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐬, and featured a mix of 𝐜𝐚𝐬𝐞𝐬, 𝐥𝐢𝐯𝐞-𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐠𝐚𝐦𝐞𝐬, 𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐧𝐞𝐫-𝐡𝐨𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐬, and a 𝐥𝐮𝐧𝐜𝐡 𝐧𝐞𝐭𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐭 with recruiters and full-time employees. $𝟏𝟎,𝟎𝟎𝟎 in total cash prizes will be awarded to overall winners and per-case winners.
